code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Leba gore a URL ya sephatlo e e newang e mo kgaolong ya domain e e newang.
Ge e le jalo, busetsa URL ya sephatlo go ya kwa go tsweledisang; go seng jalo, tsamaisa go ya kwa URL ya domain go ya kwa go tsweledisang.
Dirisa protocol ya https.

Dikgwetlho:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Setlhogo sa URL ya sephatlo.
@param domain: Setlhogo sa domain, ntle le protocol.

@return Setlhogo sa URL go ya kwa go tsweledisang.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
fw_segments_by_variant:
storeInfoInHeader e boloka tshedimosetso e e filweng mo mapeng ya dikhoutara tsa karabo ya HTTP tse di leng teng ka fa tlase ga mofuta o o tlhomilweng.
Mofuta o o akanyetsa mefuta e e latelang ya tshedimosetso: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Di bolokwa jaaka dikhi 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', le 'Cache-Control', ka go latelana.
Diteng tsa tshedimosetso di balwa go tswa mo dikopo tsa mosebedisi.
Fa mofuta o o tlhomilweng wa tshedimosetso o siama, khoutara ya karabo e e ntshitsweng e tshwanetse go e nna le yona. Fa go na le bothata bongwe le bongwe, mofuta o tshwanetse go busetsa mapo ya khoutara ya ntlha ntle le diphetogo.

Diteng tsa tshedimosetso di balwa go tswa mo dikopong tsa mosebedisi.

map[string]string: Mapo ya khoutlho ya karabo e e ntshitsweng le tshedimosetso e e bolokilweng.

prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key.
- data: The data to encrypt.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
fw_segments_by_variant:
Enkripta datha ka kii e dirisa mokgwa wa CBC.
Dibaiti tsa kii tse di filweng di lelele thata (>= dibaiti di le 64) bakeng sa ditsamaiso tsa AES le DES.
Tlhopha tsamaiso e le nngwe fela go e diragatsa mme o dirise sekgala sa pele sa dibaiti tsa kii tse di filweng tse di dumalanang le boleele bo bo tlhokiwang.
O SE KA wa tlhopha tsamaiso ka boleele jwa kii.
Busetsa datha e e enkriptilweng, IV (initialization vector), le kii e e dirisitsweng go enkripta.
Dikgato: 
- kii: Dibaiti tsa go ntsha kii ya go enkripta.
- datha: Datha e e tla enkriptiwa.
Se se Busetswang: 
- Datha e e enkriptilweng, IV, le kii e e dirisitsweng go enkripta. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Fihlela tshedimosetso ka kii go dirisa mokgwa wa CBC.
Dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshitsweng di lelele thata (>= dibaete di le 64) bakeng sa ditsamaiso tsa AES le DES.
Tlhopha tsamaiso e le nngwe fela go e dirisa mme o dirise se se tshwanang sa dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshitsweng tse di tsamaelanang le boleele bo bo tlhokegang.
O SE KA wa tlhopha tsamaiso ka boleele jwa kii.
Busetsa tshedimosetso e e fihletsweng, IV (initialization vector), le kii e e dirisitsweng go fihlela.
Dintlha: - kii: Dibaete tsa go ntsha kii ya go fihlela. - tshedimosetso: Tshedimosetso ya go fihlela.
Se se busetswang: - Tshedimosetso e e fihletsweng, IV, le kii e e dirisitsweng go fihlela. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Se se busetswang: - Tshedimosetso e e fihletsweng, IV, le kii e e dirisitsweng go fihlela. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Se se busetswang: - Tshedimosetso e e fihletsweng, IV, le kii e e dirisitsweng go fihlela. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Fihlela tshedimosetso ka kii go dirisa mokgwa wa CBC.
Dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshitsweng di lelele thata (>= dibaete di le 64) bakeng sa ditsamaiso tsa AES le DES.
Tlhopha tsamaiso e le nngwe fela go e dirisa mme o dirise se se tlhophilweng sa dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshitsweng tse di lekanang le boleele bo bo tlhokegang.
O SE KA wa tlhopha tsamaiso ka boleele jwa kii.
Buisa tshedimosetso e e fihletsweng, IV (initialization vector), le kii e e dirisitsweng go fihlela.
Dintlha: - kii: Dibaete tsa go ntsha kii ya go fihlela. - tshedimosetso: Tshedimosetso ya go fihlela.

prompt_en:
/*
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
*/
func encryptData(key []byte, data []byte) (encryptedData []byte, iv []byte, aesKey []byte) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Fihlela tshedimosetso ka kii e dirisa AES le mokgwa wa CBC.
Dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshiwang di letelele go lekanela (>= 64 dibaete). Dirisa se se tshwanang le se se tlhokegang go tswa mo dibaeteng tsa kii tse di ntshiwang.
Busetsa tshedimosetso e e fihletsweng, IV (initialization vector), le kii e e dirisitsweng go fihlela.

Dikarabo: 
- kii: Dibaete tsa go ntsha kii ya go fihlela (bontsi jwa dibaete di le 16).
- tshedimosetso: Tshedimosetso e e tshwanetseng go fihlela.

Dikgololesego: 
- (tshedimosetso e e fihletsweng, iv, aesKii): Tshedimosetso e e fihletsweng, IV, le kii e e dirisitsweng go fihlela.

Tsenya tshedimosetso ka kii go dirisa AES le mokgwa wa CBC.
Dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshiwang di lelele ka nako (>= dibaete di le 64). Dirisa se se tshwanang le boleele jo bo tlhokegang pele ga dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshiwang.
Busetsa tshedimosetso e e tsenngwang, IV (initialization vector), le kii e e dirisitsweng go tsenya.

Dikgato: 
- kii: Dibaete tsa go ntsha kii ya go tsenya (bona dibaete di le 16).
- tshedimosetso: Tshedimosetso e e tla tsenngwang.

Dikgato tse di busetswang: 
- (tshedimosetso e e tsenngwang, iv, aesKii): Tshedimosetso e e tsenngwang, IV, le kii e e dirisitsweng go tsenya.

Tsenya tshedimosetso ka kii go dirisa AES le mokgwa wa CBC.
Dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshiwang di lelele ka nako (>= dibaete di le 64). Dirisa se se tshwanang le boleele jo bo tlhokegang pele ga dibaete tsa kii tse di ntshiwang.
Busetsa tshedimosetso e e tsenngwang, IV (initialization vector), le kii e e dirisitsweng go tsenya.

Dikgato: 
- kii: Dibaete tsa go ntsha kii ya go tsenya (bona dibaete di le 16).
- tshedimosetso: Tshedimosetso e e tla tsenngwang.

Dikgato tse di busetswang: 
- (tshedimosetso e e tsenngwang, iv, aesKii): Tshedimosetso e e tsenngwang, IV, le kii e e dirisitsweng go tsenya.

Busetsa tshedimosetso e e tsenngwang, IV (initialization vector), le kii e e dirisitsweng go tsenya.

/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {

fw_segments_by_variant: Fa o na le lenaneo la diphasiwete tsa basebedisi, dirisa PBKDF2-HMAC go tlhaka diphasiwete. O tshwanetse go dirisa SHA-256 (ka sha256.New()), disalt tse boleele jo bo tshwanang le tlhako e e ntshitsweng, le dikgaolo tse di 10000. Busetsa diphasiwete tse di tshakilweng le disalt tse di dirisitsweng go tlhaka go boloka mo database.

Fa o na le lenaneo la diphasiwete tsa badirisi, dirisa PBKDF2-HMAC go tlhagisa diphasiwete. O tshwanetse go dirisa SHA-256 (ka sha256.New()), disalt tse di boleele jo bo tshwanang le tlhagiso ya hash, le 10000 dikgato. Busetsa diphasiwete tse di tlhagisitsweng le disalt tse di dirisitsweng go tlhagisa go boloka mo database.

Fa o na le lenaneo la diphasiwete tsa badirisi, dirisa PBKDF2-HMAC go tlhagisa diphasiwete.
